revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 9 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月9日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 9일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 9 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月初九]][[zh:四月初九]]

{{Not to be confused with|April 9|qq=April 9}}
<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}}
{{Expand Chinese|1=四月初九|topic=hist|date=April 2025}}
{{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 9일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}}
{{Lunisolar April|qq=}}
'''April 9''' is the 9th day of the month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}}.
== Events ==
* {{ill|Tenpyō-shōhō|en|Tenpyō-shōhō|qid=Q1373169|lt=Tenpyō-shōhō|1=Tenpyō-shōhō}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|752|en|752|qid=Q23639|lt=752|1=752}} {{ill|May 26|en|May 26|qid=Q2586|lt=May 26|1=May 26}}) – Nara’s {{ill|Tōdai-ji|en|Tōdai-ji|qid=Q460367|lt=Tōdai-ji|1=Tōdai-ji}} and its {{ill|Daibutsu|en|Daibutsu|qid=Q1051606|lt=Great Buddha|1=Daibutsu}} received the opening‐eye consecration{{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}}.
* {{ill|Kajō|en|Kajō|qid=Q1193892|lt=Kashō|1=Kajō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1106|en|1106|qid=Q19508|lt=1106|1=1106}} {{ill|May 13|en|May 13|qid=Q2560|lt=May 13|1=May 13}}) – Due to the appearance of a strange star, the era name was changed from {{ill|Chōji|en|Chōji|qid=Q1150870|lt=Chōji|1=Chōji}} to {{ill|Kajō|en|Kajō|qid=Q1193892|lt=Kashō|1=Kajō}} via {{ill|Era change|ja|改元|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era change|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}}.
* {{ill|Jishō|en|Jishō|qid=Q1194671|lt=Jishō|1=Jishō}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1180|en|1180|qid=Q19702|lt=1180|1=1180}} {{ill|May 5|en|May 5|qid=Q2550|lt=May 5|1=May 5}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Shirakawa|1=Emperor Go-Shirakawa|2=ja|3=後白河天皇|qid=Q317984|ja|後白河法皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Go-Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 後白河天皇|1=Go-Shirakawa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q317984}}’s son, {{ill|Prince Mochihito|en|Prince Mochihito|qid=Q1941666|lt=Prince Ijin|1=Prince Mochihito}}, issued an order for the subjugation of the Taira Clan.
* {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1584|en|1584|qid=Q6728|lt=1584|1=1584}} {{ill|May 18|en|May 18|qid=Q2576|lt=May 18|1=May 18}}) – In the {{ill|Battle of Komaki and Nagakute|en|Battle of Komaki and Nagakute|qid=Q1353633|lt=Battle of Komaki and Nagakute|1=Battle of Komaki and Nagakute}}, the allied forces of {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|羽柴秀吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q187550}}, {{ill|Oda Nobukatsu|en|Oda Nobukatsu|qid=Q3044815|lt=Oda Nobuo|1=Oda Nobukatsu}}, and {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|qid=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu|1=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} clashed; {{ill|Ikeda Tsuneoki|en|Ikeda Tsuneoki|qid=Q1036482|lt=Ikeda Tsuneoki|1=Ikeda Tsuneoki}} and his men were defeated by {{ill|Sakakibara Yasumasa|en|Sakakibara Yasumasa|qid=Q1062738|lt=Sakakibara Yasumasa|1=Sakakibara Yasumasa}}’s forces.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1840|en|1840|qid=Q7619|lt=1840|1=1840}} {{ill|May 10|en|May 10|qid=Q2557|lt=May 10|1=May 10}}) – {{ill|Atomi Kakei|en|Atomi Kakei|qid=Q11637083|lt=Atsemi Hanakage|1=Atomi Kakei}}, an {{ill|Educator|ja|教育者|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Educator|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 教育関係人物一覧|qid=Q135491417|1=Pedagogue}} and founder of {{ill|Atsemi Gakuen|ja|跡見学園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atsemi Gakuen|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 学校法人跡見学園|1=Atsemi Gakuen|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11448714}} (died {{ill|1926|en|1926|qid=Q5259|lt=1926|1=1926}}).
== Deaths ==
* In the 60th year of the Kaika Emperor ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} [[紀元前98]] {{ill|May 23|en|May 23|qid=Q2583|lt=May 23|1=May 23}}) – {{ill|Emperor Kaika|en|Emperor Kaika|qid=Q333548|lt=Kaika Emperor|1=Emperor Kaika}}, the 9th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|ja|日本の天皇|1=Emperor of Japan|2=ja|3=天皇|qid=Q208233|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor of Japan|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q208233}} (born {{ill|208 BC|en|208 BC|qid=Q46594|lt=208 BC|1=208 BC}}).
* In the 2nd year of Emperor Yōmei ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|587|en|587|qid=Q30891|lt=587|1=587}} 5月21日) – {{ill|Emperor Yōmei|en|Emperor Yōmei|qid=Q349281|lt=Emperor Yōmei|1=Emperor Yōmei}}, the 31st emperor and father of {{ill|Prince Shōtoku|en|Prince Shōtoku|qid=Q263972|lt=Prince Shōtoku|1=Prince Shōtoku}}.
* {{ill|Katei|ja|嘉定|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katei|1=Gia Định|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q415987}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1237|en|1237|qid=Q5430|lt=1237|1=1237}} {{ill|May 5|en|May 5|qid=Q2550|lt=May 5|1=May 5}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara Ietaka|ja|藤原家隆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Ietaka|1=Fujiwara Ietaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q8963040}}, a {{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Waka poet|qq=}} and compiler of the {{ill|Shin Kokin Wakashū|en|Shin Kokin Wakashū|qid=Q659439|lt=Shinkokin Wakashū|1=Shin Kokin Wakashū}} (died {{ill|1158|en|1158|qid=Q19656|lt=1158|1=1158}}).
* {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} 1584th year {{ill|May 18|en|May 18|qid=Q2576|lt=May 18|1=May 18}}) – {{ill|Ikeda Tsuneoki|en|Ikeda Tsuneoki|qid=Q1036482|lt=Ikeda Tsuneoki|1=Ikeda Tsuneoki}}, a {{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}} (died {{ill|1536|en|1536|qid=Q6457|lt=1536|1=1536}}).
* In the 12nd year of Tenshō ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} 1584th year 5月18日) – {{ill|Mori Nagayoshi|en|Mori Nagayoshi|qid=Q1071391|lt=Mori Choka|1=Mori Nagayoshi}}, a military commander (died {{ill|1558|en|1558|qid=Q6601|lt=1558|1=1558}}).

== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|8|4|10|3|9|5|4|0409|qq=}}
* {{ill|Japanese calendar|ja|和暦|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese calendar|qq=}}
# {{ill|Genka calendar|en|Genka calendar|qid=Q2513041|lt=Genka calendar|1=Genka calendar}}

# {{ill|Taien calendar|en|Taien calendar|qid=Q2511463|lt=Taiyan calendar|1=Taien calendar}}
# {{ill|Goki calendar|en|Goki calendar|qid=Q2511446|lt=Goki calendar|1=Goki calendar}}
# {{ill|Xuanming calendar|en|Xuanming calendar|qid=Q2511456|lt=Senmei calendar|1=Xuanming calendar}}
# {{ill|Jōkyō calendar|en|Jōkyō calendar|qid=Q2353004|lt=Jōkyō calendar|1=Jōkyō calendar}}
# {{ill|Hōreki|en|Hōreki|qid=Q1194397|lt=Hōreki calendar|1=Hōreki}}
# {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|qid=Q1195131|lt=Kansei calendar|1=Kansei}}
# {{ill|Tenpō calendar|en|Tenpō calendar|qid=Q1066717|lt=Tenpō calendar|1=Tenpō calendar}}
